name: node-abbrev
title: node-abbrev
summary: Get unique abbreviations for a set of strings - Node.js module
description:
Get unique abbreviations for a set of strings - Node.js module
Given a set of strings, this module computes a list of distinct abbreviations.
This is handy for command-line scripts, or other cases where
one wants to be able to accept shorthands.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-abbrev because Get unique abbreviations for a set of strings - Node.js module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-abbrev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-abbrev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-abbrev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
